---
title: "Teaching"
toc: true
---

<!-- I teach at the [Complutense University of Madrid](https://www.ucm.es) in the Department of Social, Work and Differential Psychology. -->

## Current Courses

### Individual Differences
*Undergraduate — Faculty of Psychology, Complutense University of Madrid*

This course reframes the classic topics of differential psychology around a single unifying question: are intelligence, rationality, and personality things we *have* — or things we *do*? Starting from the philosophy of science and the nature of uncertainty, the course builds toward a process-oriented account of individual differences grounded in the Free Energy Principle. Topics include intelligence as relevance realization, rationality as a cultivable skill, the Big Five as entropy management strategies, Bayesian belief updating, and behavioral genetics. Active learning activities challenge students to analyze person–environment fit using the entropy framework.

<!-- ---

::: {.callout-note}
Teaching materials and course resources will be added here.
::: -->

---

### [Reproducible Research & Open Science](open-science-reproducibility/index.qmd)
*Invited course/workshop*

A practical introduction to the tools and workflows for reproducible and open research — from R and VS Code to GitHub, OSF, and Zenodo — framed within the ongoing international reform of research evaluation. Includes hands-on experience with preregistration, preprints, and open data practices.

[Course details →](open-science-reproducibility/index.qmd){.btn .btn-outline-primary .btn-sm}

## Doctoral Courses & Workshops

Postgraduate courses on open science, research integrity, and the reform of research evaluation, delivered within doctoral programmes in Spain.

### Ética e integridad en la investigación científica
*Doctoral programme in Psychology — Complutense University of Madrid (12 h)*

Annual doctoral course on ethics and integrity in research, including a dedicated session on the responsible use of evaluation metrics. Editions: 2023–2024, 2024–2025, 2025–2026.

---

### Prácticas para una ciencia más abierta, ética y reproducible
*Doctoral programme — University of Málaga*

Doctoral course on open, ethical, and reproducible research practices, covering the historical context and the current transformation of the validation, evaluation, and communication of scientific work. Editions: 2023–2024, 2024–2025.

---

### Introducción a la Ciencia Abierta
*Doctoral programme — University of Jaén*

Doctoral course introducing open science and its role in building a more sustainable research ecosystem (2023–2024).

<!-- TODO (Pandelis to provide full info): add remaining doctoral courses — University of Granada course(s); joint Jaén–Málaga–Granada open-science doctoral course (2026); any other missing editions. -->
